name: traceme
description: Local-first personal observability for Claude Code — token usage, cost, tool usage, daily reports, ActivityWatch integration

interface.shortDescription: Local-first personal observability for Claude Code — token usage, cost, tool
interface.longDescription: Local-first personal observability for Claude Code — token usage, cost, tool usage, daily reports. Hooks capture session/tool/prompt data, transcript parser extracts token/cost.
